tokens: And, Dave and Jim, you're both off the TV camera now.
We're standing by for description of your progress.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: We'll be back on occasionally as we get to the MESA.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: We see you starting to come into view now.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I tell you what I'm going to do, Joe.
(Pause) I'm going to move the TV camera because it'll save us time if we don't have to tell you what we're doing.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Don't...Never...(Pause as Dave goes to the re-aim the TV at the Rover) Roger, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I have the 16 millimeter on the Rover.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And the Commander's 70 millimeter's over there.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: This is really tricky working on this slope in this soft material.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: We copy, Dave and Jim, and we're standing by for an EMU (Extravehicular Mobility Unit, meaning the suit and backpack and related gear) status check when convenient.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (To Dave) Let me know when you're finished...(Stops to listen to Joe) Okay, I'm reading 3.8 (psi) on my gauge.
Flags are clear, and I'm reading 75 percent (oxygen remaining).
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, I'm reading 3.85 (psi), flags are clear, and I'm reading 75 percent.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Trying to...Like walk up out of a crater each time.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I don't know how it's going to work when I get that geology pallet.
Might need a little help there.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Give a call (if you need help).
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, I have a flag...(correcting himself) I have a tone, rather.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I got one (meaning that he, too, heard a tone).
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: No, I don't have any flags.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Are you finished at the MESA for a little bit, Dave?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Be advised Jim's got a flap hanging from the lower right-hand corner of his PLSS which perhaps you could button up the next time you're close to him.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Yeah, I can see that in the shadow.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Back at the MESA) Yeah, we're going to have to do some cleaning of him and get that dirt off so we don't have thermal problems.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, I've got a tone again.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Taking the TCU off the pallet with his left hand, without much difficulty) This TCU was wedged in very tightly.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Jim, all our numbers on you look good down here.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: And, Jim, this is Houston requesting an EMU Mal(function checklist page) number 5 procedure when you get to a convenient break point.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: I think I'll get it, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, I'm going to come button your flap here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'd better take a break and find out what's causing the tone.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Why don't you just go through EMU number 5, and I'm just going to close your flap here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I don't have any flags at all.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Stand still a minute so I can get this flap, Jim
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, Jim, if you want, I'll step you through this procedure.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: ...valve back there for me, Dave, while you're there.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, Joe, I'm looking at EMU number 5.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Use the step that's greater than 3.4...
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: do you want me to cycle the Mode Select switch?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...and after tone off, cycle Mode Select switch to A and then to AR.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Long Pause with a momentary, high-pitched tone)
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, I'm getting a P in the vent window.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I have a P in the vent window.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: But I have a P in the vent window.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I'm going to press on slowly.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) And, Jim, we think we just have a flag and tone problem.
All your numbers look clean as can be down here.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Dave, do you want me to...Are you finished with the this (TCU) pallet that's here at the MESA.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Oh, yes, you can dump it.
I had to take the pallet out to get the TCU off.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, Dave, you're setting a new outdoor record with each toss there.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: At least we won't clutter up the immediate vicinity.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Joe, I have a tone again, but I won't even bother telling you 'cause it's...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: ...We can tell when you get a tone down here.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: That tape for the MESA blankets is something again.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Still at the MESA) You can tell, Joe, I have the geopallet on the back end of the Rover.
I don't know whether it's locked on there properly yet.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Now at the back of the Rover) Well, it looks like the geopallet is secured to the Rover.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: I'm taking the hand rails off (the geopallet) (Long Pause)
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Okay, Joe, I'm going to put the TV on the Rover now, if you're ready.
And so far the LCRU is on, locked, cable's connected; the high-gain antenna bootie (that is, the dust cover on the connector) is on.
I'll get the antenna (aimed at Earth) as soon as we get the TV on.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'll tell you, that Rover is a pretty picture out there.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Going to the MESA as Dave starts to move the TV) Sure is.
I hope the (16-mm) pictures turned out.
(Pause) Okay, SRC-l is going to the (MESA) table, Joe.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Long Pause) Okay, Dave, and we lost the picture.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, I'll have it back for you in a jiffy here.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay, I'm closing the control sample, in the...
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: There goes the old TV (on the TCU).
Trouble getting it to fit today.
(Long Pause) And the TV handle is stowed in the side so you get your thermal.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And I'm configuring the geopallet now, Joe, (as per the steps at 0+56 on LMP-6).
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) Okay; I've got (LCRU) readings for you here, Houston, if I can get down to it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Radiator temperature 1.6, and the power is 2.9.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I'm now going...You got a good check on the narrow band, Joe?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And we're going to Narrow Band.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Hey, give me a call when you want to go to TV Remote and I'll do it.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: I read you loud and clear.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Long Pause with heavy static that clears after a few seconds.)
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) (Reading) "LCRU blankets are 100-percent open; connector covers are closed; the dish is deployed." See if I can find the Earth.
(Pause) Okay; pointed right at you, Houston.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: No TV yet, but we're looking.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: ...got your favorite gadget stowed back here, Dave.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: And, we assume, in the meantime, you're pressing on here.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Dave, we want you to verify the CTV switch, On, please.
And that the high gain's pointed, in TV Remote.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Okay, we are in TV Remote; high gain is looking right at that very pretty, blue ball up there - at least half of a blue ball (being sunlit).
I did turn the CTV, On, I will...It's a spring-loaded switch; I'll do it again.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, it's spring loaded to neutral.
Maybe that's just Jim wiggling the rear end.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Oh, beautiful, I'm glad to hear that.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay; your general direction right now, it's pointed to the southwest.
You can probably look down and see the LM shadow.
And, the Sun is at about 7:30 to you now, so, you don't get in that kind of trouble (of pointing the TV at the Sun).
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: We copy and hustle on, please.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: (Emptying the contents of the ETB) In the seat pan on the CDR side: Mag E, Mag (static) Mag Oboe, Mag Kilo.
The LRV map holder is out and (I'll) get it stowed here in a minute.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Mag Lima is on the LMP's camera.
(Pause) 500 with Mag Metro (Pause) is in the seat pan and tucked away.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, Joe, in bag 2, I have the core stems and caps.
I'm putting bag 2 (SCB-2) under my seat.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: (Pause) And, the TV scenery for us is breathtaking.
transcript.speaker: Allen

tokens: Can't be half as breathtaking as the real thing though, Joe; I'll tell you.
Wish we had time just to stand here and look.
(Pause) I'll tell you, you might take a look at the old LM.
She sure does a good job (of) landing in this kind of terrain.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Bag number 4 is on the right of the tool carrier.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: The unstable base (that is, the soft soil) sure makes a difference, doesn't it, Jim?
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, the sample bags are on the individual seats, Joe.
Now I'm going to get the rake.
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Have to rake a lot of this, wouldn't you?
transcript.speaker: Irwin

tokens: Yeah, that rake may be a good thing (pause) because it doesn't look like we're going to have any piles of chips around.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: (Pause) Okay; maps are on; and your sample-bag holder is on your (Hasselblad) camera, Jim.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: And, I'll put the Sun compass and the overlay map in my seat pan.
transcript.speaker: Scott

tokens: Okay; I'm securing the Hand Tool Carrier...
transcript.speaker: Irwin
